LanguageData.Ammo_50Beowulf_FMJ.label: .50 Beowulf (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_50Beowulf_FMJ.description: A powerful cartridge with heavy bullets designed to bring high stopping power to intermediate semi-automatic rifles.
LanguageData.Ammo_50Beowulf_AP.label: .50 Beowulf (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_50Beowulf_AP.description: A powerful cartridge with heavy bullets designed to bring high stopping power to intermediate semi-automatic rifles.
LanguageData.Ammo_50Beowulf_HP.label: .50 Beowulf (HP)
LanguageData.Ammo_50Beowulf_HP.description: A powerful cartridge with heavy bullets designed to bring high stopping power to intermediate semi-automatic rifles.
LanguageData.Ammo_50Beowulf_Incendiary.label: .50 Beowulf (AP-I)
LanguageData.Ammo_50Beowulf_Incendiary.description: A powerful cartridge with heavy bullets designed to bring high stopping power to intermediate semi-automatic rifles.
LanguageData.Ammo_50Beowulf_HE.label: .50 Beowulf (AP-HE)
LanguageData.Ammo_50Beowulf_HE.description: A powerful cartridge with heavy bullets designed to bring high stopping power to intermediate semi-automatic rifles.
LanguageData.Ammo_50Beowulf_Sabot.label: .50 Beowulf (Sabot)
LanguageData.Ammo_50Beowulf_Sabot.description: A powerful cartridge with heavy bullets designed to bring high stopping power to intermediate semi-automatic rifles.
